name: Double trouble 2.0
description:
Bonds forged in times of need, crumbling under the pressure of love.

Most days Viktor and Jayce are as close as two people can be, spending hours in the lab working together to create new things, always looking for new ways to improve lives. But recently things seem to have been tense, the two have grown apart and most can often hear them fighting from outside the lab doors, but what could drive two men who were like brothers to opposing ends on the spectrum? Love, of course.

So this is a very rough draft but I wanted to get it out anyways, veeery late (not that late) but merry Christmas yall, I hears a few people had pretty shitty holidays so I hope everyone who reads this had a good time with their loved ones this winter season.
creator: N_i_k_o
